nonBlockingIssues.description: Serial OAuth loading in readFactoryOAuthProviders() could be parallelized with file provider reads for marginally faster startup
Merged ProviderState authType depends on merge order (api_key wins when env vars loaded first), potentially misleading but matches existing codebase pattern
Generic error when factoryPrefixed=true and factory is disabled — could benefit from more specific error message
FactoryResponsesProviderStrategy.buildPayload() does not delete max_output_tokens, unlike OpenAiResponsesProviderStrategy — could cause 400 errors if Factory rejects unknown fields
isFkKey() exported and tested but not consumed by any strategy class — dead code until future use
Duplicated SSE handling in FactoryResponsesProviderStrategy.handleProviderAttempt() (~60 lines same as OpenAiResponsesProviderStrategy) increases maintenance surface
Redundant parseJwtExpiry fallback in app.ts refresh path — harmless but slightly redundant
No concurrency guard on Factory token refresh — matches existing OpenAI pattern but could waste WorkOS API calls
encryptAuthV2 does not validate 32-byte key length — corrupted key produces cryptic error from createCipheriv

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: New provider integrations should isolate utility code in dedicated files (e.g., factory-compat.ts, factory-auth.ts) and register strategy classes in provider-strategy.ts. This pattern keeps provider logic contained and minimizes merge conflicts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: factory-config-credentials isolated auth in factory-auth.ts; factory-provider-strategy isolated utilities in factory-compat.ts. Both features consistently followed this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing pattern recommendation: Functions that make external HTTP calls should accept an injectable fetch parameter (e.g., fetchFn: typeof fetch = globalThis.fetch) for testability. This enables unit testing with mocked responses without global mock pollution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: factory-oauth-refresh used this pattern in refreshFactoryOAuthToken (factory-auth.ts:175) and it enabled clean unit tests for WorkOS API interaction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skill TDD requirement: The feature-worker skill mandates 'Write Tests First (Red)' but workers consistently write tests alongside implementation in a single commit. Consider relaxing to 'comprehensive test coverage required' rather than strict red-green TDD, which is impractical for config/credential/strategy features where test structure depends on implementation details.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 features in factory-backend milestone committed tests alongside implementation. All achieved excellent coverage (24+24+34 tests). Strict TDD was not followed but quality was not impacted.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update factory-api.md to note that OpenCode sanitization (quirk #4: replacing 'OpenCode' with 'Assistant' in system prompts) is not implemented in the current integration. Either mark it as 'not implemented / deferred' or create a follow-up task if it's still required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: factory-provider-strategy review noted rg 'OpenCode' src/ returns no matches, but factory-api.md still lists it as a known quirk.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update factory-api.md to clarify that x-stainless-helper-method: 'stream' header is only relevant for direct streaming Anthropic requests, not for the proxy's TransformedJson approach (which sends non-streaming requests upstream and generates synthetic SSE). Current docs may confuse future workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: factory-provider-strategy review noted the header is documented but not implemented. FactoryMessagesProviderStrategy uses chatRequestToMessagesRequest which sets stream: false.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed AGENTS.md boundary of not modifying existing provider strategies (from factory-config-credentials review)
rejectedObservations.reason: No action needed — this is a positive observation confirming convention adherence, not a gap

rejectedObservations.observation: Factory isolation pattern correct in refresh logic (from factory-oauth-refresh review)
rejectedObservations.reason: No action needed — this is a positive observation confirming convention adherence

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill deviation for no manual curl in factory-oauth-refresh justified (from factory-oauth-refresh review)
rejectedObservations.reason: Deviation is justified — feature adds no new API endpoints, only internal token refresh logic. Unit tests with mocked fetch adequately cover the WorkOS API interaction.
